metadata.title: eSign | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Send, sign, and manage business agreements inside Adon ERP with secure workflows, reminders, audit trails, and one-click approvals.

hero.title: eSign.
hero.description: Send, sign, and manage business agreements inside Adon ERP with secure workflows, reminders, audit trails, and one-click approvals.

simplifySection.title: Simplify it,
simplifySection.subtitle: automate it,
simplifySection.description: Drag and drop signature fields, assign recipients, set signing order, and let Adon ERP handle reminders, tracking, and final archiving.

features.archive: Archive signed documents in the right workspace

mobileSection.title: Whenever,
mobileSection.subtitle: wherever
mobileSection.description: Clients and teammates can review and sign agreements from any device. No printing, scanning, or back-and-forth email chaos.

controlSection.title: Your signing process
controlSection.description: Track every request, recipient, deadline, reminder, and completion status from one clean signing dashboard.

drawSignature.title: Draw or upload signature
drawSignature.description: Let signers draw, type, or upload their signature with a clean guided experience.

cryptographicTraceability.title: Cryptographic traceability
cryptographicTraceability.description: Every action is logged securely with IP, timestamp, signer identity, and audit trail.

smsAuth.title: SMS authentication
smsAuth.description: Verify signers with one-time codes before they access sensitive agreements.

signingOrder.title: Signing order
signingOrder.description: Define who signs first, second, and last with automatic workflow routing.

automaticReminders.title: Automatic reminders
automaticReminders.description: Send polite follow-ups to pending signers without manual tracking.

legalValidation.title: Legal validation
legalValidation.description: Keep completed documents archived with proof-ready signing evidence.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand your signing workflow across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern teams
ctaSection.description: Teams use Adon Sign to close agreements faster, reduce paperwork, and keep every signature traceable.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Replace manual signing with a secure, automated, and beautifully simple agreement workflow inside Adon ERP.
